description_long: This factory building complex features two large cylindrical silos made of metal, positioned adjacent to a series of interconnected industrial structures with red and gray roofs. The main building is rectangular with a mix of corrugated metal and concrete walls, and several smaller annexes and utility rooms are attached. The site includes a covered loading area with a sloped roof, and the grounds are partially landscaped with a few trees and shrubs. The silos dominate the visual profile, suggesting storage for bulk materials, while the main building likely houses processing or manufacturing operations. Large industrial windows are visible on the main structure, providing natural light to the interior. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function.
description: A large industrial factory complex with two prominent metal silos, red and gray roofed buildings, and several annexes, surrounded by sparse landscaping. The design is utilitarian and typical of modern industrial facilities.
description_view_0: This view highlights the covered loading area, the two large silos, and the main building with its red roof and attached annexes.
description_view_1: The silos are most prominent from this angle, with the main building and its industrial windows visible behind them.
description_view_2: The rear of the complex is shown, emphasizing the length of the main building and the proximity of the silos to the covered loading area.
description_view_3: This side view displays the full extent of the main building, the silos, and the various annexes, with the red and gray roofs clearly visible.
